name: tina4_bug
description: Report a Tina4 FRAMEWORK runtime bug — the framework itself misbehaves (not wrong generated code, which is a prompt/coder issue). Requires `language` (python/php/js/nodejs/ruby) and a MINIMAL, framework-only `repro` that triggers the bug using ONLY the framework, no app code — this is what proves it's a framework bug (not app misuse) and lets a maintainer reproduce it. Also give `title`, `description`, `expected`, `actual`, and `version`. Becomes a GitHub issue on the matching tina4stack repo.
